verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌۭ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ
verses.text: Woe to the defrauders,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
verses.text: who take full measure when they measure against the people,
but give less when they measure for themselves or weigh for themselves.
Do those (people) not think that they will be raised up
for a great Day,
a Day when the people will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

verses.quran_arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍۢ
verses.text: By no means! Surely the book of the depraved is indeed in Sijjīn.
And what will make you know what Sijjīn is?
A written book.
Woe that Day to the ones who call (it) a lie,
who call the Day of Judgment a lie!

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: No one calls it a lie except every transgressor (and) sinner.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: When Our signs are recited to him, he says, ‘Old tales!’

verses.quran_arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: By no means! No! What they have earned has rusted on their hearts.

verses.quran_arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
verses.text: By no means! Surely on that Day they will indeed be veiled from their Lord.
Then surely they will indeed burn in the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Then it will be said to them, ‘This is what you called a lie.’

verses.quran_arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
verses.text: By no means! Surely the book of the pious is indeed in ‘Illiyyīn.
And what will make you know what ‘Illiyyīn is?
A written book.
The ones brought near bear witness to it.
Surely the pious will indeed be in (a place of) bliss,
(lying) on couches gazing about.
You will recognize in their faces the radiance of bliss.
They are given a pure, sealed wine to drink,

verses.quran_arabic: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌۭ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ
verses.text: its seal is musk – for that let the seekers seek! –
and its mixture contains Tasnīm,
(from) a spring at which the ones brought near drink.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who sinned used to laugh on account of those who believed,
and when they passed them by used to wink at each other.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
verses.text: And when they turned back to their people, they turned back amused,

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: and when they saw them, they said, ‘Surely these (people) have gone astray indeed!’
Yet they had not been sent as watchers over them.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: So today those who believed are laughing on account of the disbelievers,
(as) they gaze about (lying) on couches.

verses.quran_arabic: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: Have the disbelievers been rewarded for what they have done?
